items.title: New OpenAI Academy courses for the next era of work
items.content: OpenAI introduces three Academy courses that help people build practical AI skills, create repeatable workflows, and apply agents in everyday work.

items.title: How Preply combines AI and human tutors to personalize learning

items.title: Supporting Europe’s work in ensuring a trustworthy AI ecosystem

items.title: BBVA puts AI at the core of banking with OpenAI

items.title: OpenAI to acquire Ona
items.content: OpenAI plans to acquire Ona to expand Codex with secure, persistent cloud environments, enabling long-running AI agents across enterprise workflows.
items.contentSnippet: OpenAI plans to acquire Ona to expand Codex with secure, persistent cloud environments, enabling long-running AI agents across enterprise workflows.

items.title: How an astrophysicist uses Codex to help simulate black holes
items.content: Discover how astrophysicist Chi-kwan Chan uses Codex to build black hole simulations, helping scientists study extreme physics and test Einstein’s theory of general relativity.
items.contentSnippet: Discover how astrophysicist Chi-kwan Chan uses Codex to build black hole simulations, helping scientists study extreme physics and test Einstein’s theory of general relativity.

items.title: PRC-linked influence operations are targeting AI debates in the US
items.content: A new report from OpenAI details PRC-linked influence operations using AI to target U.S. tech debates, data center narratives, tariffs, and false claims  about ChatGPT.

items.title: From data to decisions: how LSEG is scaling trusted AI

items.title: How engineers at Nextdoor use Codex to build without limits

items.title: Industrial policy for the Intelligence Age

items.title: Introducing the OpenAI Economic Research Exchange

items.title: Our views on AI policy and political advocacy
items.content: Our approach to AI policy and political advocacy, transparency, support for thoughtful regulation and AI safety, and that no outside political group speaks on the company’s behalf.

items.title: Building the infrastructure for the Intelligence Age in Michigan

items.title: OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now available on AWS
items.content: OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now generally available on AWS, giving enterprises a new path to build with OpenAI through the AWS environments, controls, and procurement workflows they already use. Customers can get started with OpenAI on AWS and move faster from evaluation to production.

Customers can get started with OpenAI on AWS and move faster from evaluation to production.

items.title: Boston Children’s uses AI to unlock new diagnoses
items.content: Boston Children’s Hospital uses OpenAI technology to improve patient care, reduce operational burden, and help diagnose more than 40 rare disease cases.
